# @codenhub/toast

> Experimental instance-based browser toasts and native dialogs with required
> CSS, isolated DOM/queues/tokens, and explicit lifecycle handles.

Import `@codenhub/toast/styles`, dispatch only in a browser, treat custom nodes
as trusted content, and call `destroy()` to release all owned resources.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Purpose, status, and starting points.
- [API, CSS, and lifecycle reference](docs/reference.md): Complete entrypoints,
  exports, dispatchers, handles, SSR, failures, and cleanup.
- [Accessibility and custom content](docs/accessibility-and-content.md): Roles,
  native dialogs, focus, reduced motion, sanitizer behavior, and trust boundary.
